fields.name: To Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the recipient when an email is sent to notify customers that their service items are ready.

fields.name: Body Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text of the body of the email.

fields.name: Sending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the message was sent.

fields.name: Sending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time the message was sent.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document linked to this entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document linked to this entry.
